title: 1. Information We Collect
content: Account information such as your name, email address, and profile picture when you register or sign in with Google.
Transaction data including income and expense records, amounts, categories, dates, and notes that you manually enter into FinEase.
Usage data such as pages visited, features used, and time spent on the platform to help us improve your experience.

title: 2. How We Use Your Information
content: To provide and personalize your FinEase experience, including displaying your financial summaries, reports, and transaction history.
To authenticate your identity securely using Firebase Authentication and keep your account protected.
To improve our platform by analyzing aggregated, anonymized usage patterns — we never sell your personal data.

title: 3. Data Storage & Security
content: Your data is stored securely in MongoDB Atlas, a cloud database with enterprise-grade encryption at rest and in transit.
We use Firebase Authentication for secure login, which means your password is never stored directly by FinEase.
We implement industry-standard security practices to protect your data, though no system is 100% immune to breaches.

title: 4. Third-Party Services
content: Firebase (by Google) — used for authentication and secure login. Google's privacy policy applies to this service.
MongoDB Atlas — used to store your transaction and account data securely in the cloud.
Vercel — used to host and serve the FinEase application. Vercel may collect basic request logs.

title: 5. Your Rights
content: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information at any time through your profile settings.
You may request complete deletion of your account and all associated data by contacting us directly.
You can opt out of any non-essential data collection by discontinuing use of the platform.

title: 6. Cookies
content: FinEase uses essential cookies to keep you logged in and maintain your session securely.
We do not use advertising cookies or track you across other websites.
You can clear cookies at any time through your browser settings, though this will log you out of FinEase.

title: 7. Changes to This Policy
content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or for legal reasons.
When we make significant changes, we will notify you via email or a prominent notice on the platform.
Continued use of FinEase after changes are posted constitutes your acceptance of the updated policy.
